name: Magnesium citrate
description: Magnesium citrate is a magnesium salt of citric acid with water-attracting properties. It is commonly used as a laxative to induce bowel movements for the relief of occasional constipation or emptying of the bowels prior to a major surgery or colonoscopy.

interactions.name: Tolevamer
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Magnesium citrate is combined with Tolevamer.
